components.name: button
components.description: Pressable button with variants — primary, outline, ghost, error, success, warning. Supports loading, icons, sizes.

components.name: input
components.description: TextInput with label, error, icon left/right, required indicator, focus state, sizes.

components.name: textarea
components.description: Multi-line TextInput with label, error, character count, max length support.

components.name: card
components.description: Card container with Header, Body, Footer sub-components and shadow styling.

components.name: avatar
components.description: Circular avatar with image, fallback initials, HSL color from name. Includes AvatarGroup.

components.name: badge
components.description: Small status badge with default, success, warning, error, info variants.

components.name: tag
components.description: Compact label tag with primary, success, error, warning, info, neutral variants.

components.name: chip
components.description: Selectable chip with solid/outlined types, icon support, sizes.

components.name: selectable-chip
components.description: Toggle chip with active/inactive state for filters and selections.

components.name: switch
components.description: Animated toggle switch with intent variants — primary, success, warning, error.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: Checkbox with label, checked state, and disabled support.

components.name: select
components.description: Dropdown select with modal picker, label, error, placeholder support.

components.name: alert
components.description: Alert banner with info, success, warning, error, primary variants.

components.name: toast
components.description: Toast notification with intent color border, title, message, action button, close.

components.name: accordion
components.description: Collapsible section with animated expand/collapse, title, subtitle.

components.name: divider
components.description: Horizontal or vertical divider line with optional label.

components.name: tile
components.description: Pressable tile container with subtitle and size variants.

components.name: stepper
components.description: Step progress bar showing current/total steps with intent colors.

components.name: fab
components.description: Floating action button with absolute positioning, shadow, icon, loading, variants.

components.name: icon-button
components.description: Pressable icon wrapper with default, primary, ghost variants and sizes.
